parameters.query:
-- Preview: count S4 records and groups
SELECT
    normalized_url,
    COUNT(*) AS record_count,
    MIN(created_at) AS oldest_record,
    ARRAY_AGG(record_id 
        ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS record_ids,
    ARRAY_AGG(full_name 
        ORDER BY created_at ASC) AS names,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_duplicate = FALSE 
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS primary_count
FROM _learnersRaw
WHERE stage = 'S4'
AND normalized_url IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY normalized_url
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY record_count DESC, normalized_url;

WITH ranked AS (
    SELECT *,
        FIRST_VALUE(record_id) OVER (
            PARTITION BY normalized_url
            ORDER BY created_at ASC
        ) AS primary_record_id
    FROM _learnersRaw
    WHERE stage = 'S4'
    AND normalized_url IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT
    normalized_url,
    COUNT(*) AS group_size,
    MIN(created_at) AS primary_created_at,
    primary_record_id,

    JSON_AGG(
        JSON_BUILD_OBJECT(
            'record_id', record_id,
            'full_name', full_name,
            'email', email,
            'phone', phone,
            'company', company,
            'job_title', job_title,
            'normalized_url', normalized_url,
            'is_duplicate', is_duplicate,
            'created_at', created_at,
            'stage', stage
        )
        ORDER BY created_at ASC
    ) AS group_records

FROM ranked
GROUP BY normalized_url, primary_record_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY normalized_url;

nodes.name: Execute a SQL Query1 (Fetch S4 Groups)

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO merge_audit_log
(normalized_url, primary_record_id,
 absorbed_record_ids, merged_fields,
 action, result, sql_generated)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.normalized_url }}',
  '{{ $json.primary_record_id }}',
  '{{ $json.absorbed_ids }}',
  '{{ $json.merged_fields }}',
  'duplicate_merge',
  'completed',
  '{{ $json.update_sql.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);
